title: Spatial Coordinates
description: Computed 3D spatial coordinates for a graph node, encoding conceptual domain, structural depth, and importance.

x.description: Conceptual domain axis (0–360°). Derived from UMAP dimensionality reduction on node embeddings.

y.description: Structural depth axis (0–360°). BFS distance from entry-point nodes.

z.description: Importance axis (0–1.0). Derived from PageRank centrality.

face.description: Architectural face assignment (1–6): 1=entry points, 2=business logic, 3=data access, 4=utilities, 5=config, 6=tests.
